g.text: Block Fits in Cache: Working Set Analysis

div.p: Optimal block size depends on cache size For L1-only: B ≤ 52 (use 32 or 48) For L2 fit: B ≤ 260 (use 64-128) Smaller blocks = more loop overhead Larger blocks = cache misses Auto-tuning finds the sweet spot!

g.text: Block Size | Working Set | Cache Level | Access Latency
